suggestions.title: CAG pulls up DSCL for irregularities, mismanagement - Pioneer Edge
suggestions.summary: Auto-detected from press: "CAG pulls up DSCL for irregularities, mismanagement - Pioneer Edge" — review the linked article and edit before promoting.

methodology: Keyword scan of press snapshot. False positives are normal — a signed-in moderator reviews each before promotion. Categories: incident, defect, audit, grievance, litigation.
